{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321181409CC46978CF21E319120CD"}"},"total":407},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7269386148089594682","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超喜欢这个文，内容丰富，人物刻画风趣幽默，从微末到风生水起，一路走来不容易，朴实无华的人物有血有肉的展现在眼前。加油！","text_exts":[{"e":29,"s":25,"text":"风生水起","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%A3%8E%E7%94%9F%E6%B0%B4%E8%B5%B7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774088049319120CD%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227269386148089594682%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227159439843854912548%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%A3%8E%E7%94%9F%E6%B0%B4%E8%B5%B7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692535923,"group_id":"7159439843854912548","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"时光如白驹过隙物是人非多感叹；岁月如闪电划空秋来春去莫蹉跎","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7y9iER4act1izU1Sa8Lifc=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/f76b39178448470495475ab3ecc864da~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619854&x-signature=pbWxEl0QiX4itHfGmbaXntZPwTk%3D","user_id":"60347681159","user_name":"用户60347681"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"60347681159","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776481547,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7159439843854912548","book_info":{"abstract":"上辈子在孤儿院长大的赵青嫣，意外开启了空间，开始了囤货之旅。
待到花光了存款，一场意外穿越到了古代的小山村。
开局就是长久的干旱，弄得一家人差点踏上逃荒的路。
好在峰回路转，天降大雨。
赵家女人们甩开膀子努力赚钱。
赵家的男人们从大到小，祖孙三代，都被强势奶奶给扔进了学堂。
一家人各有分工，其乐融融。
温馨日常，最是幸福。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fefd7add06f4669ed89a47642b2c4e6f","author":"春天里","author_id":"","book_id":"7159439843854912548","book_name":"继承遗产后穿越到古代","book_short_name":"被流星击中后","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a8b8c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7044人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7159439937203995173","read_count":"7044","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1697336"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"885","tags":"种田,古代言情,乡村,穿越,空间,虐渣,今穿古,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/759496dd5328074cd5774e502d57cc1a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779272049&x-signature=XutKXdICr12IaBQ7efrkD1UWBBk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3328940945453309","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.09109297e+08"},"log_ex
